title: nervilia uniflora
intro: Nervilia uniflora, also known as the single-flowered nervilia, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nervilia uniflora include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat these conditions.
